fields.name: tag
fields.label: Tag (display label)
fields.description: Short label shown above the headline, e.g. "Unit Economics"

fields.name: youtubeId
fields.label: YouTube video ID
fields.description: Just the ID from the URL, e.g. "dQw4w9WgXcQ" (not the full URL)

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
